projects.name: System Reliability & Health
projects.description: Verify all runtime components operational

tasks.title: Validate system health checks (4/5 passing)
tasks.description: Run health check suite: verify orchestrator, dashboard, agents, watchdog, cron. Accept if >=4/5 pass.
tasks.success_criteria: 4/5 health checks passing, logged to system_health.json
tasks.test_command: python3 orchestrator/health_check.py > /dev/null 2>&1; python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('reports/system_health.json')); print('PASS' if s.get('passed', 0) >= 4 else 'FAIL')"

projects.name: Dashboard Quality & State Management
projects.description: Fix missing state fields and implement schema validation

tasks.title: Validate dashboard quality tracking
tasks.description: Run dashboard quality validation: verify state.json has all required fields. Accept if schema valid.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json passes schema validation, all fields present
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from orchestrator.schema_validator import read_state_safe; s=read_state_safe(); print('PASS' if 'quality' in s else 'FAIL')"

projects.name: Policy Enforcement & Budget Control
projects.description: Wire token/rescue budget limits and model routing

tasks.title: Validate token enforcement (rescue limits)
tasks.description: Run token enforcer validation: verify 1-rescue-per-session limit is enforced. Accept if limits work.
tasks.success_criteria: Token enforcer blocks rescue after 1 use, logged to token_decisions.jsonl

projects.name: Multi-Loop Execution & Self-Improvement
projects.description: Implement DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve for multi-pass execution

tasks.title: Validate task persistence layer
tasks.description: Run persistence validation: verify completed tasks stay in projects.json. Accept if results persist.
tasks.success_criteria: Task status persists across orchestrator runs

projects.name: Local Agent Autonomy Setup
projects.description: Set up routing and task dispatch for fully autonomous execution

tasks.title: Validate error recovery (stuck task retry)
tasks.description: Run retry validation: verify stuck tasks timeout and reset. Accept if auto-retry works.
tasks.success_criteria: In-progress tasks reset to pending after 300s timeout

projects.name: P0 Blockers — Unblock Task Execution (URGENT)
projects.description: Fix 6 critical blockers preventing local agents from executing tasks. Must complete within 12 hours.

tasks.title: P0: Fix task state persistence — results must update projects.json
tasks.description: After each agent completes a task, orchestrator must persist: status='completed', quality_score, elapsed_time, result summary. Currently agent results are lost and tasks never transition from in_progress. Test: run_version() with any pending task, verify projects.json status updates and quality is non-zero.
tasks.success_criteria: At least 1 task transitions from pending→completed in projects.json; quality_score is non-zero

tasks.title: P0: Fix task router stuck-task logic — retry in_progress > 5 min
tasks.description: Currently projects_loader.py skips all in_progress tasks forever, so they get stuck. Must add: if task status='in_progress' AND elapsed > 300s, reset to 'pending' and re-execute. Add timeout field to track when task entered in_progress state. Test: create stuck task, verify it retries after 5 min timeout.
tasks.success_criteria: Stuck task (in_progress > 5min) resets to pending and re-executes; add test case to verify

tasks.title: P0: Wire quality score pipeline — executor → projects.json → dashboard
tasks.description: Quality metric completely broken: executor returns quality=85 but dashboard shows 0. Trace: agents/executor.py → orchestrator/main.py → orchestrator/projects_loader.py → dashboard/state.json. Add logging at each step. Ensure quality_score is normalized and persisted. Test: executor returns quality=85, verify it appears in projects.json AND dashboard/state.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard state.json shows quality > 0 for completed tasks; quality flows end-to-end

tasks.title: P0: Dashboard state writer — enforce schema validation
tasks.description: state.json has null/empty fields: quality, model, recent_tasks, changelog, research_feed. Writer must validate: (1) no null values allowed, (2) missing fields get defaults, (3) types validated. Test: attempt to write invalid state, verify schema correction.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json never has null/empty required fields; all writes pass schema validation

tasks.title: P0: Wire token enforcer module into orchestrator
tasks.description: Module exists (orchestrator/token_enforcer.py) but not connected to execution flow. Must wire: (1) Check is_rescue_allowed() before any rescue decision, (2) Deduct tokens on rescue, (3) Block rescue if limit exceeded (10% budget), (4) Log all decisions to reports/token_decisions.jsonl. Test: hit token limit, verify rescue is blocked.
tasks.success_criteria: Rescue decisions logged and budget-enforced; token limit blocks rescue when 10% exceeded

tasks.title: P0: System health check baseline — all 5 checks pass
tasks.description: Establish baseline: Verify orchestrator running, dashboard server alive, agents responsive, watchdog active, cron jobs executing. Create reports/system_health.json with results. Test: run each check independently, document expected values, add to CI/CD health monitoring.
tasks.success_criteria: 5/5 health checks pass; results logged to reports/system_health.json with timestamps

tasks.title: 🚨 EMERGENCY: Fix orchestrator/main.py hang (BLOCKING SYSTEM)
tasks.description: CRITICAL: orchestrator/main.py hangs indefinitely when called with --version 1 --quick 1. Multiple processes running and never completing. This blocks the full-loop cycle and prevents any tasks from executing. Must debug and fix immediately. Test: run 'python3 orchestrator/main.py --version 1 --quick 1' and verify it completes in <30 seconds without hanging.
tasks.success_criteria: orchestrator/main.py completes successfully with test tasks in <30 seconds; no hung processes; full-loop cycle completes end-to-end

projects.name: Incident Response
projects.description: Auto-filed system incidents

tasks.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Detect and restart stale agents (>10min inactive)
tasks.description: Executor and Architect stuck running stale tasks for 7+ hours. blocker_monitor doesn't detect stale states. Need to: (1) Detect agents with status != 'blocked' but elapsed_time > 600s, (2) Auto-restart stale agents, (3) Clear their task assignments, (4) Reset agent state.
tasks.success_criteria: Stale agents auto-detected and restarted. Executor and Architect tasks cleared and reset.

tasks.title: P0: Task dispatch broken
tasks.description: All 5 tasks pending, none executing. Orchestrator not picking up tasks from projects.json.

tasks.title: P0: Tasks not executing
tasks.description: No tasks executing (all pending). Orchestrator may not be dispatching tasks from projects.json.

tasks.title: Fix blocker_monitor stuck-state detection
tasks.description: Executor stuck in 'recovering' state for 6+ min not detected. Monitor only checks status='blocked'. Need to add elapsed-time check for stuck states.
tasks.success_criteria: Blocker monitor detects and fixes agents stuck > 5min in recovering state

projects.name: Ultra Workflow Integration & Auto-Execution
projects.description: Complete inline workflow editor integration, auto-execute pending tasks, performance metrics, and validation

tasks.title: Test inline workflow editor in dashboard
tasks.description: Verify Workflow tab loads correctly on localhost:3001. Test drag-drop reorder, export/import, execute button. Verify all controls work. Accept if UI loads and all buttons functional.
tasks.success_criteria: Workflow tab loads, drag-drop works, all buttons responsive

tasks.title: Validate auto-execute API endpoint
tasks.description: Test POST /api/tasks/auto-execute endpoint. Verify it dispatches tasks correctly and returns proper response format. Accept if endpoint works and returns execution summary.
tasks.success_criteria: API returns successful execution data with task counts

tasks.title: Verify performance metrics API
tasks.description: Test GET /api/metrics/performance endpoint. Verify it returns CPU, memory, disk, task completion metrics. Check data accuracy and format. Accept if all metrics return and are properly formatted.
tasks.success_criteria: Metrics endpoint returns all required fields

tasks.title: Sync state.json with real project metrics
tasks.description: Update dashboard/state.json to reflect actual task completion from projects.json (31/31 tasks). Ensure metrics match reality: quality score, task counts, agent status. Accept if state.json shows correct metrics.

tasks.title: Verify WebSocket sync between workflow editor and agents
tasks.description: Test real-time status updates in workflow editor when agents execute tasks. Verify stage status changes (idle/running/completed) sync via WebSocket. Accept if status updates appear within 1 second.
tasks.success_criteria: WebSocket updates workflow stage status in real-time

tasks.title: Ensure single dashboard on localhost:3001
tasks.description: Verify only port 3001 is running (no 3002, 3003, 8000, 3000). Kill any extra dashboard processes. Confirm single unified dashboard works. Accept if only 3001 runs.
tasks.success_criteria: Only localhost:3001 running with unified dashboard

tasks.title: Test workflow configuration persistence
tasks.description: Change workflow order in UI (drag arrows). Refresh page. Verify order persists. Export config, import on fresh page, verify loads correctly. Accept if persistence works both ways.
tasks.success_criteria: Workflow order persists across page refresh

tasks.title: Enable auto-dispatch of pending tasks in 10min loop
tasks.description: Update .claude/10min_loop.sh to call POST /api/tasks/auto-execute endpoint every cycle. Ensure pending tasks auto-execute without manual intervention. Accept if loop calls endpoint and executes tasks.
tasks.success_criteria: 10min loop auto-executes pending tasks via API

tasks.title: Polish workflow editor UI and responsiveness
tasks.description: Enhance workflow editor visuals: better mobile support, smoother animations, improved colors, better spacing. Test on multiple screen sizes. Accept if UI looks polished and works on mobile/tablet.
tasks.success_criteria: UI responsive on all screen sizes, smooth animations

tasks.title: Optimize dashboard performance (load time, render speed)
tasks.description: Profile dashboard load time on localhost:3001. Optimize CSS/JS, reduce bundle size. Measure: dashboard load <1s, workflow render <200ms, WebSocket update <50ms. Accept if all targets met.

tasks.title: Update documentation to reflect inline workflow integration
tasks.description: Update WORKFLOW_EDITOR_README.md and related docs to reflect new inline integration (no iframe, single port 3001). Update API documentation with new endpoints. Accept if docs are current and complete.

projects.name: 🔴 CRITICAL: System Stability & Production Hardening
projects.description: Extreme remediation for agent stalls, token tracking, state sync, auto-recovery, and production readiness

tasks.title: [P0] URGENT: Kill redundant dashboard instances (3000, 3002)
tasks.description: Stop all Python processes on ports 3000 and 3002. Keep ONLY 3001 running. Verify no conflicts. Accept if only 3001 listens.
tasks.success_criteria: Only port 3001 running, other ports free

tasks.title: [P0] Implement real-time state.json sync from projects.json
tasks.description: Create state_sync_daemon.py that updates dashboard/state.json from projects.json every 1 second. Sync: task counts, completion %, agent status, quality score. Accept if state always reflects truth.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json updates every 1sec, metrics always accurate

tasks.title: [P0] Implement token efficiency tracking (90% local target)
tasks.description: Create token_tracker.py that logs token usage to state/runtime-lessons.json. Track: local_tokens, claude_tokens, local_percentage. Target: 90% local. Show metrics in dashboard.
tasks.success_criteria: Token metrics tracked, local_percentage shows in dashboard

tasks.title: [P0] Implement continuous work generation (never run out of tasks)
tasks.description: Create task_generator.py that monitors pending queue. If pending < 3 tasks, auto-create 5 new tasks (based on project needs). Keep queue always full. Accept if queue never empty.
tasks.success_criteria: Pending queue always has 3+ tasks, auto-generated as needed

tasks.title: [P0] Implement agent auto-recovery (no more stuck agents)
tasks.description: Create agent_healer.py that monitors agent status every 30 seconds. If agent idle > 5 minutes without task, auto-assign next pending task. If fails 3x, escalate. Accept if agents never stuck.
tasks.success_criteria: No agent stuck idle >5min, auto-recovery working

tasks.title: [P0] Verify & remove all external cron jobs
tasks.description: Check crontab for any scheduled jobs. Verify no external crons running. Confirm all scheduling internal to daemon/10min_loop. Accept if zero external crons.
tasks.success_criteria: crontab -l shows empty, all internal scheduling

tasks.title: [P1] Implement automatic PR detection and merge in 10min loop
tasks.description: Update 10min_loop.sh to: detect open PRs, check if >=1 approval, check for conflicts. Auto-merge clean PRs. Skip if conflicts. Accept if PRs auto-merged.
tasks.success_criteria: Open PRs auto-merged if approved and no conflicts

tasks.title: [P1] Implement workflow phase auto-selection (no manual picking)
tasks.description: Create workflow_dispatcher.py that auto-selects workflow phases based on task type (code_gen->full pipeline, bugfix->execution+validation, analysis->retrieval+analysis). No manual workflow picking needed.
tasks.success_criteria: Workflow phases auto-selected per task type

tasks.title: [P2] Ultra UI upgrades: Real-time metrics, live agent status, workflow viz
tasks.description: Upgrade dashboard/index.html with: real-time metric updates, live agent status cards, workflow visualization, performance graph, task timeline. Make ultra-modern Apple-style design.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard shows real-time metrics, smooth animations, responsive

tasks.title: [P2] Performance benchmarking and optimization
tasks.description: Profile dashboard load time, task dispatch speed, render performance. Targets: <500ms dashboard load, <100ms dispatch, <30ms render. Optimize CSS/JS. Accept if all targets met.

tasks.title: [P2] Implement epic progress tracking with ETA
tasks.description: Create epic_tracker.py that calculates: % complete per epic, time remaining, ETA completion. Show in dashboard. Update every 10min. Accept if all epics show ETA.
tasks.success_criteria: All epics show % complete and ETA completion date

tasks.title: Add cache expiry policies (LRU + time-based)
tasks.description: Smart cache eviction, prioritize frequently-used, expire stale
tasks.success_criteria: Cache hit rate stable >90%, no stale data served

projects.name: 🔄 E3: Advanced Resilience & Self-Healing
projects.description: Predict failures, heal proactively, zero-downtime updates

tasks.title: Implement predictive failure detection (anomaly detection on metrics)
tasks.description: ML-based anomaly detection on latency/error/memory, predict failures 10min ahead

tasks.title: Build proactive rebalancing (move load before failure)
tasks.description: Rebalance agents before predicted failure, prevent cascades

tasks.title: Implement canary deployments (10% traffic → full rollout)
tasks.description: Deploy to 10% first, monitor, gradually increase if healthy
tasks.success_criteria: Canary catches 99% of regressions before full rollout

tasks.title: Add blue-green deployment (zero-downtime updates)
tasks.description: Run v1 and v2 in parallel, switch traffic atomically

tasks.title: Build chaos engineering test suite
tasks.description: Inject failures (network partition, GPU OOM, agent crash) and verify recovery
tasks.success_criteria: System recovers from all 20+ chaos scenarios automatically

projects.name: 🔄 E3: Enterprise Observability & Analytics
projects.description: Comprehensive logging, tracing, analytics for production visibility

tasks.title: Implement distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry)
tasks.description: Full request tracing across agents, async tasks, Claude calls
tasks.success_criteria: Trace 100% of requests, latency breakdown visible

tasks.title: Build time-series analytics dashboard (Grafana-style)
tasks.description: Real-time graphs for latency, throughput, error rate, token usage
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard shows 20+ key metrics, updates every 10s

tasks.title: Implement alerts + on-call escalation (Slack/PagerDuty)
tasks.description: Auto-alert on SLA breach, escalate to on-call engineer
tasks.success_criteria: Alerts sent within 1min of breach, 100% delivery

tasks.title: Build audit logs (compliance + security tracking)
tasks.description: Immutable log of all actions, model decisions, data access
